name: Taqueria Las Palmas
tagline: Authentic Mexican food on Santa Rosa Avenue.
seoDescription: Taqueria Las Palmas — a family-run Santa Rosa taqueria on Santa Rosa Avenue serving authentic Mexican food: carnitas, al pastor, chiles rellenos, blackened fish tacos, huge burritos and breakfast all day. 4.6 stars across 240+ reviews, open daily 9–9.

contact.address: 415 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95404

hero.heading: Authentic Mexican, made fresh.
hero.subheading: A bright, family-run taqueria on Santa Rosa Avenue — carnitas, al pastor, chiles rellenos, blackened fish tacos and burritos big enough to share. Breakfast served all day.

images.heroAlt: Authentic Mexican food at Taqueria Las Palmas in Santa Rosa, CA
images.storyAlt: Street tacos with lime at Taqueria Las Palmas
images.storyCredit: Representative photo (CC) — pending the taqueria's own

about.heading: A Santa Rosa Avenue staple
body: Taqueria Las Palmas is the kind of family-run neighborhood taqueria Santa Rosa keeps coming back to — a bright, casual stop on Santa Rosa Avenue where the carnitas are juicy, the chorizo is the real thing, and the burritos come big enough to split. Locals will tell you it's their first suggestion when out-of-towners ask where to find good Mexican food.

It's authentic, affordable, and made fresh, with breakfast served all day and friendly, fast service at the counter. Eat in, grab it to go, or call ahead — either way you're getting a generous, honest plate of food.

services.title: Tacos & al pastor
services.description: Al pastor, carne asada, carnitas, chicken and blackened fish — on warm tortillas with onion, cilantro and our salsas. The simple stuff, done right.

services.title: Burritos & plates
services.description: Big, flavorful burritos and full plates — chicken, carne asada, carnitas or veggie — with rice, beans and everything that makes them a meal you can split.

services.title: Breakfast all day
services.description: Chorizo and eggs, breakfast burritos and more — the morning classics, served any time of day.

services.title: Seafood & specialties
services.description: Camarones al mojo de ajo (shrimp in garlic sauce), chiles rellenos and carne asada quesadillas — a few favorites worth coming back for.

hoursNote: Open every day, 9 AM to 9 PM. Eat in, take out, or call ahead at (707) 546-3091.

sections.heading: What people order
sections.intro: A neighborhood taqueria menu — generous portions, fair prices, made fresh.

sections.quote: Taqueria Las Palmas is always my first suggestion when guests ask where to find the best Mexican food.
sections.author: Google reviewer

items.quote: Massive burritos, both flavorful and affordable — portions that rival the best I've had in San Francisco.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.quote: Juicy carnitas, great chorizo, perfectly cooked eggs, and the flan is delicious. Real attention to detail.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.quote: Perfect drive-in food place — everything was tasty and the service was superb.
items.author: Google reviewer

items.q: Where are you, and when are you open?
items.a: 415 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa. Open every day, 9 AM to 9 PM.
All day. Chorizo and eggs, breakfast burritos and the morning classics — any time you come in.

items.q: Can I get it to go?
items.a: Yes — eat in or take out. Call ahead at (707) 546-3091 and we'll have it ready.
We do — veggie burritos and more, made fresh alongside everything else.

sections.heading: Come hungry.
sections.text: Authentic Mexican food, made fresh on Santa Rosa Avenue — breakfast, tacos and burritos worth sharing.
